previousDayImpact: Morocco's victory over Canada provided a significant boost for Team Pahl and Team Mack, who both gained 15 points.
France's win over Paraguay helped Team Godfather maintain their top position while allowing Bijan Mustard to climb the leaderboard with 13 points.
leaderboardSummary: Team Mack and Bijan Mustard both surged four places up the standings following their successful picks in the Round of 16.
Team Pahl climbed two spots into second place, narrowing the gap behind the current leader, Team Godfather.
Team Godfather remains in first place after adding 13 points to their total.
leverageWatch: Team Pahl and Team Megatronless have opposing interests in the Norway vs. Brazil match, as Team Pahl holds Brazil while Team Megatronless is split between both teams.
Team Choo Choo holds a unique position in the England vs. Mexico match, as they are the only entry with England, while Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz also holds Mexico.
